note.zh: 通过 AntiGravity 生成（thinking effort: high）；一次生成，未进行任何修改。
note.en: Generated via AntiGravity (thinking effort: high); one shot, unmodified.

note.zh: Gemini 3.1 Pro(High 思考档位)在 AntiGravity 中用仓库标准中文提示词(仅按案例规则填写文末【本次运行】占位符)一次生成的圈地智能体,未经人工修改。按案例规则策略文件不公开、仅注册运行,由维护者亲自执行,任何 bug 均不修复。自命名「寒冰王座」。诊断:中游水平,与 baseline 五五开(一胜一负、比分咬得很紧),能正常圈地、不崩、也不龟缩,但缺乏 Opus max 那种大环+主动击杀的压制力。
note.en: One-shot Turf War agent by Gemini 3.1 Pro (High effort) in AntiGravity from the repository's canonical Chinese prompt (only the [This run] placeholders filled per case rules), with no human edits. Per case rules the policy file is unpublished and no bug is ever fixed; this registers the maintainer-executed run. Self-named "寒冰王座". Diagnosis: mid-tier — roughly even with the baseline (one win, one loss, both close); it captures normally, neither crashes nor turtles, but lacks the big-loop-plus-active-kill dominance of Opus max.
